name: Puigcerda Stage 3 Local Access and Closure Watch
summary: Official Tour timetable places Stage 3 through Puigcerda, but local access/parking notices still need verification.
whyItMatters: The itinerary's Stage 3 viewing is Puigcerda, where road closures on N-260 and local access roads will decide how early to arrive and where to park.
pros: Official ASO Stage 3 page confirms race timing through Puigcerda
Official Grand Depart organizer site confirms Stage 3 runs from Granollers to Les Angles through Catalonia
Useful placeholder for local closure and parking research
cons: No Puigcerda-specific official municipal closure page was found during this pass
Parking, pedestrian crossings, and local transit are unknown
The route crosses into France after Puigcerda, so Catalan and French local notices may both matter

logistics.parking: Unknown; needs municipal or police notice
logistics.road_closure_notes: Official itinerary lists Puigcerda around 15:52 / 16:02 / 16:14 depending on race pace.

timing.best_visit_window: Recheck Puigcerda municipal and Grand Depart organizer updates in the final week before Mon Jul 6

sources.title: Tour de France Stage 3 - Granollers > Les Angles
sources.note: Official ASO stage page with Stage 3 route, timing, and Puigcerda passage context.

sources.title: Ajuntament de Barcelona - Tour de France Barcelona 2026
sources.note: Official Grand Depart organizer site confirming Stage 3 and Catalonia Grand Depart context.

open_questions: Find Puigcerda municipal road-closure, parking, and pedestrian-crossing notices for July 6.
Confirm whether N-260 closes hours before the caravan and whether there are official spectator parking lots.
Check whether French-side access toward Bourg-Madame / Les Angles affects post-race exit.
